flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coastal Alabama Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Coastal Alabama Community College rose 25% between 2007 and 2010 (13.1% → 16.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Coastal Alabama Community College rose 12% between 2009 and 2010 (12.9% → 14.5%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Coastal Alabama Community College are 8% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.9k vs $32.2k).
